ddls:
CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., Parents, Health care professionals) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the group (e.g., 0-18, 19-35) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the group was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pain_management_techniques" (
  "technique_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pain management technique */,
  "technique_name" TEXT /* Name of the pain management technique */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pain management technique */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the technique belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the technique was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the technique was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technique_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_records" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "technique_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pain management technique */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period (e.g., Past, Future) */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Count of usage */,
  "usage_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of usage within the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the usage record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the usage record was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., survey, clinical trial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_records_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_records_technique_id FOREIGN KEY ("technique_id") REFERENCES pain_management_techniques ("technique_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_differences" (
  "difference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage difference record */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "technique_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pain management technique */,
  "difference_percentage" REAL /* Difference in usage percentage between past and future periods */,
  "p_value" TEXT /* P-value indicating the statistical significance of the difference */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the p-value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the difference record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the difference record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("difference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_differences_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_differences_technique_id FOREIGN KEY ("technique_id") REFERENCES pain_management_techniques ("technique_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technique_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technique_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping record */,
  "technique_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pain management technique */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technique_category_mapping_technique_id FOREIGN KEY ("technique_id") REFERENCES pain_management_techniques ("technique_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technique_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES technique_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the usage record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_usage_id FOREIGN KEY ("usage_id") REFERENCES usage_records ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "technique_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pain management technique */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating (1-5) for the pain management technique */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_technique_id FOREIGN KEY ("technique_id") REFERENCES pain_management_techniques ("technique_id")
)
